narrative:
Fairfield Twp 13 (precinct in Butler County) has 455 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points.
